message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram

participant "CommandLine" as CommandLine
participant "AppSolver" as AppSolver
participant "DataReader" as DataReader
participant "PreVerification" as PreVerification
participant "Model" as Model
participant "Solver" as Solver
participant "PostVerification" as PostVerification
participant "Solution" as Solution
participant "Exception" as Exception
participant "Terminate" as Terminate

== Normal Flow ==
CommandLine -> AppSolver: Launch App
activate AppSolver
AppSolver --> CommandLine: Arguments valid
deactivate AppSolver

AppSolver -> DataReader: Read data
activate DataReader
DataReader --> AppSolver: Read successfully
deactivate DataReader

AppSolver -> PreVerification: Verify the data
activate PreVerification
PreVerification -> Model: Generate the model
activate Model
Model --> PreVerification: Construct successfully
deactivate Model
PreVerification --> AppSolver: Data is ok
deactivate PreVerification

AppSolver -> Solver: Solve the problem
activate Solver
Solver --> AppSolver: Solve successfully
deactivate Solver

AppSolver -> PostVerification: Verify the solution
activate PostVerification
PostVerification --> AppSolver: Solution is accepted
deactivate PostVerification

AppSolver -> Solution: Export
activate Solution
Solution --> AppSolver: Export successfully
deactivate Solution

AppSolver -> Terminate: Finish, exit normally
activate Terminate
deactivate Terminate

== Error Handling ==
note right of AppSolver: Invalid Arguments, then display Usage
note right of DataReader: Read failed, show the fatal error
note right of PreVerification: Data isn't valid
note right of Model: Construct failed, show the fatal error
note right of Solver: Solve failed, show the reason
note right of PostVerification: Solution is rejected
note right of Solution: Export failed, show the fatal error

AppSolver -[dotted]-> Exception: Invalid Arguments, then display Usage
DataReader -[dotted]-> Exception: Read failed, show the fatal error
PreVerification -[dotted]-> Exception: Data isn't valid
Model -[dotted]-> Exception: Construct failed, show the fatal error
Solver -[dotted]-> Exception: Solve failed, show the reason
PostVerification -[dotted]-> Exception: Solution is rejected
Solution -[dotted]-> Exception: Export failed, show the fatal error

Exception -> Terminate: Exit with error
@enduml
```
